article_meta.title: Elections Unsealed Court Docs Show The FBI Probing Possible Election Crimes In Fulton County By: M.D

reasoning: Good attribution discipline and several genuine author-prose biases flagged, but includes one clear false positive and misses multiple strong biased phrasings in the author’s voice.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s prose; no quoted or attributed source language was wrongly flagged.

custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several clear author-level biases, including 'runs cover' (re: WaPo), 'curiously left out,' and 'apologists' framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels on valid items are largely appropriate (Spin/Word Choice/Opinion-as-fact). One could argue Flawed Logic for the 'nothing to hide' line, but the chosen label is defensible.
